title: Teleconferences - Murthy Law Firm | U.S Immigration Law
content:
Originally offered as a teleconference, this is now a Podcast series – still designed to guide employers who have foreign national employees.
Join our eMail list to receive a brief description of the latest topic and link to the recording before it is announced to the general public!
You must be an employer, HR manager, or similar agent in a company.   If you have already attended a Murthy Law Firm corporate teleconference, you remain on this list. Be sure to check your Junk / Spam folder if you stop receiving the eMails.
Later each month, the Podcast is announced to the general public and is made available under the MurthyAudio tab on our homepage and through Apple’s iTunes . All prior episodes of the Podcast can be found in these locations.
To join this list, please eMail the following information to teleconference@murthy.com .
- Title / Position in the Company
- Contact Telephone Number
Share the announcement with your company representative. This Podcast series covers a wide variety of topics addressing concerns of U.S. employers.
Contact our office for information about a FREE Pre-Hire consultation for employers .
This Podcast mailing list is managed by MailChimp, but we control enrollment manually, as it is a service intended for employers. You may unsubscribe or make changes to your subscription from the bottom of any Podcast eMail you receive. You may eMail teleconference@murthy.com with any problems. We never sell or share our eMail lists with anyone for any purpose.

## Past Murthy Teleconferences are also available as Podcasts on iTunes. Click below.
